primary_dx_title: Calculus of bile duct with cholangitis, unspecified, without obstruction
ground_truth_dx_titles: Calculus of bile duct with cholangitis, unspecified, without obstruction
Hypertensive heart and chronic kidney disease with heart failure and stage 1 through stage 4 chronic kidney disease, or unspecified chronic kidney disease

Hypertensive chronic kidney disease with stage 1 through stage 4 chronic kidney disease, or unspecified chronic kidney disease
Benign prostatic hyperplasia without lower urinary tract symptoms

Family history of ischemic heart disease and other diseases of the circulatory system
Personal history of malignant neoplasm of prostate

ontology_routing.reasoning: The patient has multiple cardiovascular and renal issues, with symptoms and findings suggestive of heart failure and chronic kidney disease. There are no specific respiratory or infectious symptoms that strongly indicate a particular disease.

candidates.rationale: The patient has a history of heart failure with preserved ejection fraction (HFpEF) and presents with nocturnal hypoxia and leg swelling.
The patient has elevated creatinine and low electrolytes, indicating a possible exacerbation of chronic kidney disease.
